title: S  Shively
compiled_truth: S  Shively is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-28 to 2002-02-25), S  Shively sent 164 and received 783 emails, totalling 947 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (29), [Geoff Storey](people/geoff-storey) (13), [Chris Gaskill](people/chris-gaskill) (12), [Mike Grigsby](people/mike-grigsby) (10), [A  Martin](people/a-martin) (9).
